description: Shadow router spec for task-aware model routing. Does NOT change production routing yet.

escalation_rules: If task involves auth/security/payment/data/secrets → escalate to qwen3.6-plus
If task involves 4+ files or sensitive paths → escalate to qwen3.6-plus
If task is ambiguous or vague → escalate to qwen3.6-plus (plan-first)

architecture_long_context.description: Auth, schema, state-model, cross-surface design decisions
escalation_rules: If task involves auth/security/payment/data/secrets → escalate to qwen3.6-plus
If task involves long-context synthesis → keep qwen3.6-plus

bounded_implementation.description: Approved code changes on explicit touch list
escalation_rules: If task involves auth/security/payment/data/secrets → escalate to qwen3.6-plus
If task involves 4+ files or sensitive paths → escalate to qwen3.6-plus
If touch list is incomplete → escalate to qwen3.6-plus (plan-first)

read_only_exploration.description: Fast repo mapping, runtime-path search, dependency search
escalation_rules: If task requires edits → escalate to qwen3.6-plus (implementation route)
If task is ambiguous → escalate to qwen3.6-plus
If task involves browser gate → must run Playwright verification
If visual quality regresses → escalate to qwen3.6-plus

review_risk_failure.description: Repo-grounded review, safety second-pass, risk verdicts
escalation_rules: If task involves auth/security/payment/data/secrets → escalate to qwen3.6-plus
If review is inconclusive → escalate to qwen3.6-plus

budget_summarization.description: Cheap read-only alternative for review, planning, routing summaries
escalation_rules: If task requires reasoning beyond summarization → escalate to qwen3.6-plus

release_conformance.description: Conformance suite execution, gate validation, protocol enforcement
escalation_rules: If conformance fails → escalate to qwen3.6-plus for analysis
If protocol decisions needed → escalate to qwen3.6-plus

m2b_canary.rationale: Lowest risk route: read-only, no edits, no sensitive paths. deepseek-v4-flash is already configured as small_model.
m2b_canary.rollback_plan: Revert to qwen3.6-plus if quality/latency regresses
